title: Notification text static — misleads user when START_STICKY revives orphaned service
description: buildNotification() hardcodes 'nie is running' regardless of relay connection state. If START_STICKY is kept (see nie-a8ds.1), the notification text 'nie is running' appears even when the service is an orphan with no WebSocket. A future contributor reading the notification spec will not understand why the text doesn't update with connection state. Fix: either update notification text dynamically (connected vs. reconnecting) or resolve nie-a8ds.1 first (remove START_STICKY), at which point the notification is only shown when genuinely connected.
close_reason: Root cause fixed: START_NOT_STICKY means the service only runs when genuinely connected; static text 'nie is running' is now always accurate when the notification appears.
